# An MSNBC Paradox & Netflix-Nielsen Drama

**Source:** inputs/saved_html/An MSNBC Paradox & Netflix-Nielsen Drama_Mon,_25_Nov_2024_20-08-09_+0000_19364f063c7927c5.html
**Processed:** 2025-08-24T19:12:32.452954

A $121M Magritte, Maddow’s New Deal, Blue State Tax War
 ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

| |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | |  | | --- | | [View email in browser](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUWk8tZ3dzdWFXNWRBMGtlekF6Zz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | [The Daily Courant](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUWk8tZ3dzdWFXNWRBMGtlekF6Zz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | [The Daily Courant](https://email.puck.) | | |  | | --- | | **A $121M Magritte, Maddow’s New Deal, Blue State Tax War** | | Welcome back to The Daily Courant, your afternoon download featuring Puck’s best new reporting.     First up today, **Dylan Byers** diagnoses the latest anxieties engulfing 30 Rock after **Brian Roberts** ’ bombshell SpinCo announcement: With MSNBC putting the finishing touches on a five-year, nine-figure contract to retain **Rachel Maddow** , what does the staggering deal portend for the less essential talent and the network’s rank and file? In short: Nothing good…     Plus, below the fold: **Marion Maneker** chronicles a promising week of sales at New York’s auction houses, led by a $121 million **Magritte** . **Abby Livingston** reveals the surprising contours of a looming intraparty G.O.P. battle. On *The Varsity* , former Turner Network president **David Levy** joins **John Ourand** to break down the **Tyson** - **Paul** Netflix numbers, Amazon’s R.S.N. opportunities, the TNT-ESPN deal, and much more. And on *The Powers That Be* , **Jon Kelly** reunites with **Peter Hamby** for a sprawling conversation on the latest media talking points. | |  | | [Maddow Money](https://email.puck.) | | DYLAN BYERS | | News and notes on the latest anxieties inside MSNBC in its SpinCo singularity: questions about the Maddow deal, looming Stamford realities, and much more. | | | |  | | --- | | **A MESSAGE FROM GOLDMAN SACHS** | |  | | Find a competitive edge with insights from Goldman Sachs' top economists and strategists.     The Outlooks provide a thorough examination of market trends, regional developments, and sector-specific forecasts.      [**Read the Outlooks**](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Beyond the Banana-rama](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUWk8tZ3dzdWFXNWRBMGtlekF6Zz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvYmV5b25kLXRoZS1iYW5hbmEtdGhlLXJlc3Qtb2YtdGhlLWV2ZW5pbmctYXJ0LWF1Y3Rpb24tcmVzdWx0cy8_) | | MARION MANEKER | | Look past the crypto spectacle of Cattelan’s $6.2 million duct-taped fruit, and it’s clear that the premier auctions showed a steady appetite for the superstars’ stand-out works—Magritte, Ruscha, Prince—but a less reliable hunger for everything else. Of course, the houses are declaring victory. | |  | | [SALT Wars](https://email.puck.) | | ABBY LIVINGSTON | | While Republicans celebrate their inroads in suburban counties, an intraparty battle is brewing over a tax that disproportionately hits wealthy counties in blue states—the very places an emboldened G.O.P. wants to flip. | |  | | [The ESPN-TNT Crossover](https://email.puck.) | | JOHN OURAND | | Former Turner Network prez David Levy joins John for a rollicking discussion of Comcast’s bombshell decision to spin off its cable channels, Amazon’s opportunities to dominate the R.S.N. market, the brilliance of Netflix’s Tyson-Paul fight, the ripple effects of the TNT-ESPN deal, and much more. | | | |  | | --- | |  | |  | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Media Monday: Comcast’s Cable Questions & Netflix’s Nielsen Drama](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUWk8tZ3dzdWFXNWRBMGtlekF6Zz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvcG9kY2FzdF9lcGlzb2RlL21lZGlhLW1vbmRheS1jb21jYXN0cy1jYWJsZS1xdWVzdGlvbnMtbmV0ZmxpeHMtbmllbHNlbi1kcmFtYS8_) | | PETER HAMBY & JON KELLY | | Jon Kelly reunites with Peter to dissect Comcast’s seismic spinoff. Is this the beginning of the end for news networks like CNBC and MSNBC? Then they scrutinize Netflix’s viewership numbers for the Tyson-Paul fight and debate whether monoculture can exist in today’s media climate. | | |  | | |  | | --- | | [Puck](https://email.puck.) | | |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Facebook](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUWk8tZ3dzdWFXNWRBMGtlekF6Zz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWNlYm9vay5jb20vcHVja2RvdG5ld3M_) | [Twitter](https://email.puck.) | [Instagram](https://email.puck.) | [LinkedIn](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | | Need help?
